Thank you for reading this blog post, hopefully, the blog post was informative and helped you to understand in detail how to use Quality Assurance Approval and Instant Forward features.

entry.title: Configuring Standard API in S/4 HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Generating OData of standard API :

First we have to login to SAP business accelerator hub account and go to SAP S/4 HANA Cloud Public edition.

 

Choose a standard API as shown below

 

 

 In this case I have choose the product master standard API.

 

Select the overview tab, under that we can see Communication Scenario ID.

 

 

Copy communication scenario from standard API. Now Move to the

 S/4Hana cloud system -> Communication Arrangements

Select the Option New, and add a Scenario ID which we have copied from the Standard API

 

Create new communication system:

Search for Communication System in S/4 HANA cloud, here we need to create user and password for all OData services

Click on New, 

System will ask for new communication system id and system name. we can give the ID & Name of our choice. And Click on create. 

Give the Host name as shown below,  

In User for Inbound Communication, click on Add and Create New Inbound Communication User. Click on “New User” 

Give the username and description and select on proposed password to get the password which will give by system itself. (Copy the user name and password and paste somewhere so that, Once the user and password has created we can use the same for all the OData service Consumption.) 

Click on create 

Click on Save  

Then add your custom communication system in this communication arrangement

Then you get required ODATA URL

Now will connect S/4HANA Cloud to Power BI or any other reporting tools through OData Feed. Example:Open Power BI->get Data->OData feed.

In the OData feed enter the OData URL generated in S/4HANA Cloud. And give user name and password that we have generated in S4hana cloud “Communication System” to get the OData url.

Then Click on connect.

Select the checkbox to data preview and click on Transform data or Load.

entry.title: Overcoming Challenges in Staffing Customer Projects with SAP Project and Resource Management
entry.content:
One of the main challenges of staffing customer projects is ensuring that you have the right skills and expertise available to meet the specific needs of each project. This can be particularly challenging when customer projects are diverse and require a wide range of technical and functional skills. In order to effectively address this challenge, resource pool managers should maintain a thorough understanding of the skills and capabilities of their available resources. This may involve conducting regular skill assessments, keeping detailed records of each resource's expertise, and staying informed about industry trends and emerging technologies.

Another challenge is managing the availability and workload of resources. It is common for resource pool managers to be responsible for allocating resources across multiple projects simultaneously. This can be a complex task, especially when resources are in high demand and have limited availability. In order to address this challenge, resource pool managers have to prioritize projects based on their strategic importance, assess the availability and workload of resources accurately, and communicate effectively with project managers to ensure that resources are allocated effectively.

Additionally, resource pool managers may encounter challenges related to resource allocation and scheduling. It is essential to ensure that resources are utilized efficiently, and that they are allocated to the right projects at the right time. This may involve developing comprehensive resource allocation plans, establishing clear communication channels with project managers, and being adaptable to changes in project scope and requirements.

In order to overcome these challenges, resource pool managers nowadays have to rely on information technology that enable them to streamline the staffing process and cope with the growing number of resources requests.

SAP has therefore added a new cloud-based solution to it’s solution portfolio “SAP Project and Resource Management ” formerly also known as "SAP S/4HANA Cloud for projects". This solution specifically targets the resource planning and staffing process in service industries, but which can be also applied to any other industry managing large pools of project resources for internal and  customer projects.

SAP’s latest project resource management solution offers three major capabilities to streamline the staffing process for customer projects.

Specify Resource Requirement

The first capability is to specify the resource requirement, which includes details such as the requested period for resources, total effort in hours, and required skill set for the job. This request can be created manually or automatically pre-filled from related projects in SAP S/4HANA cloud such as Professional Service Projects ( Customer Projects)  and Enterprise Projects (planned to be available by August 2024 - Note: Roadmap is subject of change).

Traditional SAP S/4HANA customers with a private cloud or on-premise installation can create project demands in SAP Project and Resource Management using available APIs.

Review Resource Request

Review Resource Request Details

The Resource Manager receives via the resource request all necessary details to start the resource search process, while the resource requestor can retrieve the latest status and validate assignments.

Search and assign resource to request

The second capability is to search and assign resources to the request, where the resource pool manager can compare and assign resources that match the minimum availability and required skill sets. This ensures that resources are allocated efficiently and effectively. Details from the resource request are automatically used to generate a list of matching resources that full fill the minimum availability and required skill sets. In the Comparison View the resource pool manager can compare multiple resources head -to head to check e.g. Proficiency Level for each skill.

Before hitting the assign button the resource pools manager can adjust how much of the demand should be covered by this resource and in which period. The Quick Assign button skips this step and directly assigns the resource to fully cover the required demand.

Resource Comparison View

Comparison View in the Assignment Section of the Resource request

Optimize the utilization

The third capability is to optimize utilization, allowing resource managers to receive an overview of resource utilization in projects and available capacities for additional project work. This helps in distributing workload and achieving better utilization across all resources.

The Manage Utilization view is great way to quickly retrieve the status of the resource pool showing utilization and assignments per planning period and individual resource. Here the resource pool manager is able to drill down to individual project assignments and adjust the assignments, which allows him to distribute the workload in the team and achieve a better utilization across all resources.

Team Utilization

Team Utilization Overview Screen

In order to fully optimize the utilization of a pool of project resources, it is essential to have up-to-date information on their skills and job experience from previous projects. SAP Project and resource Management provides a self-service function that empowers employees to continuously update their skills, qualifications, and proficiency levels after completing new trainings or customer projects.

Resource Profile Page

Maintenance of skills and experiences in Resource Profile View

In conclusion, staffing customer projects as a resource pool manager can be a complex and demanding task. However, by maintaining a comprehensive understanding of available resources, managing resource availability and workload effectively, and leveraging technology to streamline the staffing process, resource pool managers can overcome these challenges and ensure that the right skills and resources are allocated effectively. SAP Project and Resource Management supports organisations with large resources pools to facilitate the collaboration between project managers , resource manager and team members during the entire staffing process. This leads to more accurate information about demands and capacities, shorter staffing cycles and reduced manual backoffice efforts.

For additional information on SAP Project and Resource Management please visit following pages:

Product page on www.sap.com

SAP Community Blog - The Two Project Control Possibilities

SAP Community Blog - How to improve Project Collaboration with Contractors and Suppliers 

SAP Help Portal - SAP Project and Resource Management

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408亮点前瞻：技术话题（Technology Cross Topics）
entry.content:
1. 数据迁移

在SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition的2408版本中，Migration Cockpit新增了以下迁移对象：

  • Asset to control tax credits (Brazil)

  • Bank

  • Configurable BOM links

  • EHS - Business partner for waste transporters and disposers

  • EHS - Control

  • EHS - Job

  • EHS - Waste disposal channel

  • EHS - Waste stream

  • EHS - Waste transporter and disposer

  • EHS - Waste type and waste codes

  • In-house banking account (new)

  • In-house banking condition (new)

  • PC - Ecological information

  • PC - Toxicological information

  • PC - Use

  • QM - Quality level

  • Real estate - Usable object

  • Routing (new)

以下迁移对象被标记为“Deprecated”：

  • Bank (deprecated)

  • Business solution order (deprecated)

  • FI - Bank account balance (deprecated)

  • JVA - Joint venture master data (deprecated)

  • Routing (deprecated)

如想了解关于数据迁移在2408版本中的更多信息，请查看以下链接：

Change Overview for SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2408 | SAP Help Portal

 

2. Belize主题弃用

在2408版本更新中，界面显示外观主题的Belize系列将被弃用。如果您正在使用这些主题，建议您更新到Horizon主题。

 

3. 锁定产品主数据特定字段不可编辑

在产品主数据应用中，新增了一个复选框可以锁定指定字段，被锁定的字段将变得不可编辑。

 

4. 更方便的查看扩展对象的更新

在之前的版本中，我们会在不同的文档链接中发布那些已更改、已删除、已弃用或新的扩展对象，比如CDS视图、API、业务对象接口等等。那样你会需要查看很多文档链接，不够方便。

现在，我们将在一个统一的链接里公布所有的扩展对象的更新，你可以使用不同的过滤器查看你感兴趣的更新。

你可以记住以下地址，该链接会始终打开最新版本的内容：

 https://help.sap.com/S4_CE_CHANGES_EXT_OBJ

 

5. 在IAM Information System里查找业务角色和预定义空间的关系

当我们在给业务角色分配空间，想知道什么预定义空间分配给了哪些角色。那么，我们可以在IAM Information System应用里查找到这些信息。

点击Business Role - Launchpad Space，我们可以快速查找相关信息。

entry.title: Highlights of the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 Release
entry.content:
The second major release of the year 2024 is here! The SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 release is filled with innovations that boost your productivity and support your everyday work life.

I am thrilled to give you further insights on our fully-fledged cloud ERP, supporting your journey to the intelligent, sustainable enterprise in this blog post.

If you prefer rather watching than reading, you are welcome to check out my product update video:

Figure 1: Check out my top highlights of the release in this video.

Before I start with feature-based innovations, I am proud to announce that we have generally uplifted our system availability service level agreement for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and Integrated Business Planning from 99.7% to 99.9% for all our customers. This leap signals our reliability and the investments into technology, hardware, procedures, and automation that we continuously make to deliver a world-class SaaS ERP service to you. This marks another superior level of service availability and helps customers to plan business operations with greater precision at less risks. To put it into context: This cuts the upgrade downtimes by another 66%.

The new service level agreement sets a high standard for our cloud operations moving forward. 

And there’s more: Since mid-July, GROW with SAP premium subscription has expanded to include SAP Sales Cloud and Concur Expense solutions. Both enhances our Cloud ERP and gives it more horizontal width to allow customers bring more use cases onboard our solution.

And we keep the good news coming! While delivering more functional and technical based value to our public cloud customers, we reduce the complexity of monetizing digital business models by bringing contract accounting and invoicing capabilities into the core SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition offering. With the 2408 release, SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition for contract and accounting will be part of GROW with SAP. We are giving our customers full access to the high volume, high performance and high automation invoicing, and subledger solution that focuses on service, subscriptions, pay-per-use, and multi-sided business models, without extra metering based on revenue and expenses. No action required for our existing GROW customers, the expanded functionality is included up to their licensed GROW FUEs and will automatically become available from SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 for all customers.

Learn more about GROW here: https://www.sap.com/products/erp/grow.html


Figure 2: Discover the value of GROW with SAP.

We offer you even more room to GROW: Constantly updating our methodology stays important! For this release, we are excited to announce significant updates to our GROW Adoption Plan, designed to streamline and enhance the adoption process for customers and partners. By integrating new deliverables and accelerators into the GROW Adoption Plan and SAP Cloud ALM, companies can achieve a faster and more efficient implementation experience. This release features GROW Adoption Plan tagging, combining new adoption deliverables and related accelerators, including the Multi-Country Deployment and Application Lifecycle Management accelerators with new content. Additionally, our updated quality gates now include the first iteration of adoption elements, which will further integrate into SAP Cloud ALM.

Available for some time, but in between releases and therefore, potentially new to some, we are also offering our customers guidance for transitioning from the two-system-based landscape to the three-system landscape of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.


Figure 3: We are offering our customers guidance for transitioning from the two-system-based landscape to the three-system landscape of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

 

Also, SAP introduces new sustainability capabilities to support organizations in meeting their sustainability ambitions and goals as well as regulatory requirements. These include automated ESG reporting via the SAP Sustainability Control Tower and AI-enhanced carbon footprint calculations through the SAP Sustainability Footprint Management solution. Additionally, both solutions feature a carbon calculator engine for comprehensive emissions reporting, and the upcoming SAP Green Ledger will integrate greenhouse gas emissions into financial decision-making.

 

Speaking of artificial intelligence: A lot has happened here in the past months. With SAP’s Business AI strategy, we are defining the future by embedding SAP Business AI along our entire portfolio:

Relevant – Reliable – Responsible

Figure 4: With SAP Business AI, we accelerate your business processes and optimize decision-making.

Enough upfront news–without any further ado, let’s check out what I additionally consider as highlights of the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 release.

 

Modern and Intelligent Experience

SAP User Experience

Through artificial intelligence, we help to get your work done faster and change the user experience–starting with our generative AI copilot, Joule. After a successful phased roll-out in the Early Adopter Care program, Joule will grace your SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition system with a continuous delivery shipment very soon, at current state of planning in quarter 3/2024. Joule works as follows: Formulate your business need in natural language and Joule will provide easy access to applications and data, lowering manual tasks and boosting productivity.

Figure 5: Our natural-language, generative AI copilot Joule provides easy access to applications and data.

 

SAP Business AI offers you a cutting-edge SAP Fiori experience via smart summarization and easy filter. Smart summarization jump starts your collaboration or follow-up by extracting the essential information of the object pages of the SAP Fiori elements applications you are using in the system. With easy filter, you can select data of “list report-based" SAP Fiori apps instead of defining filter values manually. All of this in natural language. These AI use-cases are available in beta testing. Check out the SAP Customer Influence page to sign up: https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#campaign/3698

Figure 6: AI-assisted smart summarization extracts the essential information of the object pages of the SAP Fiori elements apps you’re using in the system.

Figure 7: With easy filter, you can select data of “list report-based" SAP Fiori apps instead of defining filter values manually.

 

To enhance transparency around significant system changes, we’ve established a scalable communication strategy, allowing the delivery of important messages to specifically chosen customers and users, following the "need-to-know" principle. This in-app communication was highly requested by our customers and partners through advisory groups and our influence portal and permits us to spotlight essential customer activities in the system. Catering messages to such specific requirements facilitates delivering reminder information solely to those customers who haven't yet performed important requisite system activities and those users who possess the necessary authorization to carry out these tasks. A first example of this approach is the targeted communication pertaining to SAP Fiori launchpad settings, i.e., the switch to spaces and pages.

Figure 8: Target users get system pop-ups after login showing critical must-dos and must-knows for their user role including a linked document for details.

 

Finance

In finance, we introduce new review booklet for cost centers. This app provides a concise display of both actual and planned costs, organizing several predefined reports under 'Actuals' and 'Plan/Actuals' pages. It provides business applications that embed crucial insights into the relevant business context, supporting the answering of critical business queries effectively and efficiently. It seamlessly integrates application logic, guidance, and multidimensional insights and upholds the promise of "insight to action" within embedded analytics, enabling users to analyze actuals and plan data in a single report while providing the flexibility to toggle between guided views and generic slicing, dicing, and pivoting based on specific business requirements.

Figure 9: Display, analyze, and validate cost center data with the new review booklet.

Additionally, we enable you to analyze and summarize data from the cost-center review booklet into actionable financial business insights with the help of generative AI. This use case is available in beta testing. Check out the SAP Customer Influence page to sign up: https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#campaign/3698

Figure 10: Gain financial business insights with the help of generative AI.

 

GRC, Trade, and Tax

This release delivers an innovative experience in managing US-internal tax configuration powered by Joule. The process of maintaining tax jurisdiction codes and rates has been simplified from a dozen steps to only three! Users just can use a natural language prompt to retrieve detailed information from the AI, then verify, simulate, and save the configured tax jurisdiction codes and rates. Once the connection between your SAP system and the LLM is configured, users can chat directly with the AI to retrieve detailed address-based tax jurisdiction information. Furthermore, the LLM delivers links to the respective state tax or revenue authority, providing users with an easily accessible way to verify their tax rate information prior to simulating and saving the changes. This use case is currently available in beta testing. To register, check out the SAP Customer Influence page: https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/campaign/3698

Figure 11: Joule helps to simplify the process of maintaining US-internal tax configuration.

 

Sales

One of the key highlights here is the auto-activation of the intelligent scenario for input recommendations for sales orders. This feature significantly boosts efficiency and cost savings by hastening the activation of the intelligent scenario for sales order recommendations. Implemented when scope item 73P gets activated, the system employs an auto-training mechanism that periodically trains the machine learning model based on the business data from the past year. Users have the flexibility to enable or disable this auto-training in the ‘Intelligent Scenario Management’ app. This functionality guarantees automatic set-up, training and operation of the intelligent scenario, making the sales order completion more efficient and intuitive while reducing costs.

Figure 12: Auto-activation of the intelligent scenario for input recommendations makes the sales-orders process more efficient and intuitive.

 

Product Compliance

With this release, we enable the generation of product compliance documents with integration into the safety data sheet process. Users can now generate a first selection of sections of an EU safety data sheet (without country/region-specific additions) for product compliance solutions using Adobe Document Services. This not only extends the product compliance solution with integrated document generation capability but also streamlines the generation of documents for product compliance data. This is based on versatile Adobe form templates and form data providers. The generated documents are seamlessly integrated into the safety data sheet process. This also comes with new apps to manage and release data for handling and storage as well as stability and reactivity of products, making it a comprehensive tool for product compliance.

Figure 13: You can now easily generate a first selection of sections of an EU safety data sheet using Adobe Document Services.

 

ERP Innovations

Manufacturing

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 introduces advancements in the ‘Monitor Material Coverage’ SAP Fiori apps. The ‘Monitor Material Coverage – Net Segments’ and the ‘Monitor Material Coverage – Net and Individual Segments’ apps now offer additional columns displaying the number of rescheduling proposals for a material. This improvement assists businesses in avoiding supply shortages or an excess of supplies. This is achieved by indicating the number of Material Requirements Planning (MRP) supplying elements with rescheduling proposals for each material. Additionally, the system can reschedule in, reschedule out, or cancel a process based upon a calculation for the entire planning horizon. The enhanced features enable better management of supply shortages and excess supply with MRP material coverage apps, providing a more effective and streamlined operation.

Figure 14: Manage supply shortages or excess supply with additional columns in the ‘Monitor Material Coverage’ SAP Fiori apps.

 

Supply Chain Management

In this release, we ship the warehouse-driven split of the outbound delivery order. This feature empowers organizations to separate packed and unpacked items, quantities, or handling units from an existing outbound delivery order into a new one. This offers increased flexibility in case a complete picking is not possible, added functionality if space in the truck is limited, and the ability to split outbound delivery order items for which no warehouse task has been created yet. It’s also possible to split handling units into a new outbound delivery order. The release therefore provides businesses with improved logistical abilities, offering greater adaptability in managing outbound delivery orders.

Figure 15: The warehouse-driven split of the outbound delivery order empower organizations to separate packed and unpacked items, quantities, or handling units from an existing outbound delivery order into a new one.

 

Solution and Subscription Business

Here, I want to highlight a feature from the latest CFD release which I believe has huge business value for organizations transitioning to solution-led business models. The introduction of advanced solution bundling enables you to pre-configure complex solution orders which can contain multiple configurable and non-configurable items, and sell them on a single solution order, providing greater flexibility whilst saving effort on manual input. This enables the sale of complex end-to-end solution offerings tailored to specific customer needs.

Figure 16: Pre-configured bundles can be added to a solution order and processed for further fulfilment.

 

Service

In this release, we enable you to add maintenance plan templates in service contracts. This enhancement simplifies the workflow drastically, particularly for those dealing with service contracts that include maintenance plans. During the creation process of service contract templates, you can already add maintenance plan templates to service contract items. After creating a service contract from a service contract template, the maintenance plan templates are also copied. When you release a service contract item, a new maintenance plan is automatically created using the maintenance plan template. If you don’t use service contract templates, you can add maintenance plan templates directly in a service contract.

Figure 17: Maintenance plan templates facilitate the service contract process significantly.

 

Enterprise Porfolio and Project Management

To better support the engineer-to-order process, we ship an innovation to reserve materials using project demand. When it comes to project demands, we offer three categories: resources, services, and materials. In the category of materials, we now offer ‘Project Stock Reservation’. A project procurement controller or project manager can select the WBS element, the plant, the material ID, the quantity, and eventually also the storage location, and then reserve material for a project on a certain date. Once the demand is requested, a reservation number gets generated. With the monitoring capabilities, you can view how many quantities have been delivered in case certain quantities in stock are issued against the material. This creates transparency for the project procurement controller.

Figure 18: The ability to reserve material using project demand makes workflows more efficient and project management more effective.

 

Professional Services

The shared risk-based revenue recognition for professional service projects feature addresses potential customer projects that exceed the initial scope, allowing service providers to bill at regular rates before charging reduced rates for any additional work. A new revenue recognition key (SPTMSR) supports this shared risk model. This enables more precise revenue recognition where additional work is required, increasing flexibility for revenue recognition and reducing manual efforts to adjust accrued revenues. In this model, if the need for additional work is identified, the system considers the reduced rate during revenue recognition. The feature signifies an important step towards enhancing accounting accuracy and transparency in service-oriented sectors, promoting mitigation of financial risk, and improving overall project management.

Figure 19: Shared risk-based revenue recognition for professional service projects enhances accuracy and transparency.

 

Sourcing and Procurement

A purchase contract is an agreement between a buyer and a supplier with agreed pricing, quantity, terms, and conditions. Since purchase contracts are long-term documents, they are subject to change over time. By enabling versioning of purchase contracts, businesses can meticulously track various versions of contracts each time a modification is made to an active purchase contract. Following alterations to fields set for versioning, the system automatically creates a new version. The new version can then become an active document, subject to the approval process. The versioning feature enhances transparency and efficiency by enabling comparisons between two document versions, including changes notable in pricing. This function ultimately aids in fostering improved collaboration between buyers and suppliers.

Figure 20: Versioning in purchase contracts fosters improved collaboration between buyers and suppliers.

 

Asset Management

In this release, we introduce an enhanced feature of recording the "As-Found" condition in the 'Perform Maintenance Jobs' app. The app offers maintenance technicians an improved way to record the initial condition of an asset during proactive and routine maintenance jobs, even when the maintenance order does not have a maintenance notification assigned. If the specific technical object differs from the overall order header, a new notification will be created automatically while the technician records the "As-Found" condition. Previously, the malfunction data tab was enabled only if the order has an associated notification. Now, these tabs are accessible by default in orders with notifications. Additionally, configurations can allow users to maintain malfunction data, thereby providing users with better recording of asset reliability data which in turn enhances the overall user experience.

Figure 21: We enhance the recording of the “As-Found” condition in the ‘Perform Maintenance Jobs’ app.

 

Environment, Health, and Safety

A new application for managing the investigation process significantly improves the tracking and oversight of investigation projects, allowing for more effective and efficient processes. The ‘Manage Investigations’ app offers a comprehensive platform where pertinent details such as investigation phase, persons involved, and timelines can be meticulously documented and managed. Administrators can determine the course and progression of investigations, and delegate necessary tasks for seamless operation. This new tool pursues both procedural integrity and simplicity, with a user-friendly interface coupled with robust functionality. Ultimately, it enhances user experience, strengthens accountability, and fosters greater efficiency in managing the investigation process.

Figure 22: The new ‘Manage Investigations’ app fosters great efficiency in managing the investigation process.

 

Two-Tier ERP

In two-tier ERP, Tier 1 acts as an original equipment manufacturer on SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition and Tier 2 acts as a service subsidiary on SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.  With this set up, organizations can perform claims processing and subsequent reimbursements between their service organization and original equipment manufacturer. In this release, we introduce a refined warranty claim process, aiding you in effectively managing and navigating through the complexities of warranty claims. The process offers improved visibility into various aspects such as claim creation, processing, submission, and tracking. In addition, the solution accelerates assessment and administration of warranty claims with built-in automation that streamlines the end-to-end warranty management. As a part of service management, this efficient mechanism ensures quicker resolution time, reducing both manual effort and the overall operating cost for the business. Essentially, the enhancement in the warranty claim process signifies an evolution towards improved customer satisfaction and a more strategic approach to service operations.

Figure 23: The new warranty claim process offers improved customer satisfaction and a more strategic approach to service operations.

 

SaaS Foundation

Extensibility

The cloud extensibility model with a three-system landscape in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition enables customers to seamlessly leverage SAP innovations, resulting in future-proof extensions that are compliant throughout their lifecycle and do not require adjustments during cloud innovation cycles. With this model, we can develop cloud-ready business apps, services, or custom extensions that are both upgrade-stable and cloud-ready. With developer extensibility, as a customer or partner, you can use one-off delivery for ABAP development intended to remain within your SAP S/4HANA Cloud landscape which enables you to import the developed custom ABAP code in a three-system landscape into the test and production system of the current landscape.

With multi-off delivery, we take it a step further. Custom development can be performed by a partner on behalf of a customer, in a separate development system which is not connected to the customer landscape, and then deployed on the customer's three-system landscape using the ‘Git-Enabled Change and Transport System’ (gCTS). The source code of ABAP extensions is stored in remote Git repositories, with gCTS being used to transfer (push and pull) the ABAP custom code between SAP S/4HANA Cloud landscapes and Git repositories. This is especially useful for scenarios where source and target landscapes can't be connected via transport routes. The SAP Fiori app ‘Git-Enabled CTS (gCTS)’ helps to manage tasks such as connecting to remote Git repositories, pushing and pulling commits, and managing branches. Commits are created in the development environment using ABAP development tools for Eclipse (ADT) when a task of a transport request is released. Find more information here.

 

Figures 24 & 25: Multi-off delivery brings a multitude of possibilities for custom development.

 

Public Sector Management

Public sector functionality within SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition is broadening in terms of geographical availability. In addition to the US, Canada, and Germany, services such as grants management, budget management, and fund accounting is now also available in the UK, the Netherlands, and Australia. The global deployment of our service has started and is gaining great momentum. Be prepared for the availability in additional countries by the year 2025.

Additionally, we bring new, comprehensive budget management functionalities:

  • Addition of a Substitution Tool for Budget Maintenance.
  • Enhancement allowing the consumption of budget for expected expenses rather than the posting date.
  • Feature to check Public Sector budget availability using project hierarchies.
  • Updates to facilitate the generation of budget documents.
  • Improved reporting on budgets versus payments and open invoices.

Figure 26: This release includes significant updates to the early release enablement cycle for public sector.

 

R&D Engineering

In this release, we ship the integration of CAD design for data and file management. With this SAP Product Lifecycle Management solution, seamless interaction between engineering designs and SAP business processes is now feasible, i.e., you can easily transfer engineering bills of material (EBOMs) from the SAP Product Lifecycle Management solution and continue to work on them as manufacturing bills of material (MBOMs) in the relevant ‘Maintain Bill of Material (Version 2)’ app. The CAD tools extend their capabilities by being able to store files in the SAP PLM Product Data Integration (PDI), leading to the development of an Enterprise Product Structure within SAP’s Product Lifecycle Management. This integration simplifies the transfer of product data via product handover to SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, reducing the number of interfaces and facilitating a smoother operation. The end result is higher efficiency in engineering processes, holistic product description for increased transparency, and reduced operating costs. Overall, it signifies a major stride towards optimizing product data management in industry-specific CAD applications.

Figure 27: The integration of CAD design for data and file management enhances your engineering processes.

 

Business Partner Data

This release presents an enhancement in data privacy management, allowing users to concurrently assign data controllers along with specific purposes to business partners. This upgrade significantly bolsters the concept of “privacy by design and default” by permitting users the flexibility to manually or automatically attach data controllers to business partners. With options to leverage this feature via the ‘Maintain Business Partner’ and ‘Manage Business Partner’ SAP Fiori apps or through API channels, businesses can effectively manage their partner master data. This advancement not only ensures timely compliance with stringent data protection regulations but also molds business processes to instill trust among partners and customers. By enhancing the data privacy landscape, this feature equips businesses with the edge to meet legal requirements and foster a venerable relationship with their customers.

Figure 28: You can now assign data controllers along with specific purposes to business partners.

 

Information Lifecycle Management

SAP Information Lifecycle Management (SAP ILM) allows users to manage the lifecycle of live and archived data. Users can set rules for managing data throughout its lifecycle, specifying how long it should stay in the database, how long it should be archived, and when it should be deleted. This can be done consistently across development, test, and production systems. With the 2408 release of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, one key feature is the self-service configuration user interface (SSCUI). This tool allows users to centrally maintain SAP ILM settings and transport them across the system landscape i.e., development, test and production systems, reducing the risk of errors and inconsistencies. Another key feature with this release is the storage of archive files to SAP HANA Cloud data lake files, ensuring fast and efficient access to archived data. Previously, these files were stored in the Neo platform. This change helps to store the SAP ILM archive files on a future-proof, fast, and cost-efficient technology stack, supporting both SAP ILM use cases: data volume management and data privacy. This change exclusively affects the underlying technology stack, with no impact on usability.

You can find more information here.

 

Figures 29 & 30: SAP Information Lifecycle Management (SAP ILM) allows users to manage the lifecycle of live and archived data.

 

Identity and Access Management

Unlock the full potential of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition with the unified access to documentation about Identity and Access Management (IAM) on SAP Help Portal! With this, we provide a simplified, one-stop shop for all IAM-related documentation, making it easier for users to access everything you need to know about user and identity management, roles, authorization, and authentication. The documentation covers all IAM-related tasks in the different phases of implementation (prepare, realize, run, and upgrade) making the process more streamlined and efficient. This unified access to IAM documentation provides a holistic view on IAM for SAP S/4HANA Cloud and integrated products from initial system access to tasks which need to be completed before, during, and after upgrading SAP S/4HANA Cloud and allows you to familiarize yourself with its key concepts. 

Figure 31: Check out the documentation about Identity and Access Management on SAP Help Portal.

 

Summary

You see, the world is turning fast, and we keep you at the forefront of progress–but these are by far not all innovations we have in store with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408. Stay tuned for the individual blog posts diving deeper into selected lines of business and industries. 

Don’t hesitate to leave a comment and check out our community page to ask your questions and engage with the experts. Follow the PSCC_Enablement tag to stay up to date with our latest blog posts.

Follow us on @SAP and #S4HANA, and myself on LinkedIn to not miss the next update.

 

📽️ Watch the Replays of Our SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 Early Release Series!

From July 8 to July 12, we hosted a series of 20 compelling live sessions to highlight the exciting innovations shipped with the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 release. Missed the live sessions? We've got you covered! Take advantage of the entire series or pick and choose the sessions most relevant to you. Don't miss this chance and watch them on demand–anywhere, anytime.

🔎Find All of Our Assets

SAP S/4HANA Cloud is the foundation of the intelligent, sustainable enterprise and is an innovative, robust, and scalable ERP. We at Cloud ERP Product Success and Cloud Co-Innovation offer a service as versatile as our product itself. Check out the numerous offerings our team has created for you below:

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408: Final What's New & Product Assistance available
entry.content:
With immediate effect, the final What's New information for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 is now available. SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition is based on the technical product SAP S/4HANA Cloud.

To access the Final What’s New information, please use the What’s New Viewer.

For further formats and languages of the What's New information, as well as pre-filtered views, please use the following SAP S/4HANA Cloud Help Portal page.

In addition, the final Product Assistance (aka Application Help) for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 is available. Please use the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Help Portal page to access the Product Assistance in multiple languages.

For you as a customers, we recommend to also use the Release Assessment and Scope Dependency (RASD) tool.

The Release Assessment and Scope Dependency (RASD) tool provides you with a personalized and tailored view on What’s New information based on the activated and used scope within your system. The information for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 will be available in RASD within the next few days. A valid Customer S-user ID is required for login. We recommend to use RASD to prepare for upgrades and updates of your system and to focus on the new and changed features that are relevant for you as a customer.

There is a new commenting feature available for the What’s New in the release SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2408. The feature is now available for this release as part of a pilot that will end on August 21, 2024. During the pilot, authors will evaluate your feedback and incorporate it into the documentation, if needed. We hope that by opening this channel of communication, we can learn how to further improve our What’s New content for you. 

To use this feature, you need to be logged into the Help Portal. The feature will only be available in the English version of the documents. To learn more about how the feedback process works in SAP Help Portal, see Giving Documentation Feedback.

entry.title: Finance in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408
entry.content:
Hello everyone, Uli here from SAP's Product Engineering Finance Team. I'm thrilled to share an update on our latest release - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 for Line-of-Business Finance. This update highlights significant innovations including business AI:

  • Financial Planning and Analysis: Cost Center Review Booklet
  • Financial Planning and Analysis: Review Booklet for Cost Centers: Gaining Financial Business Insights Powered by AI (Beta)
  • Financial Planning and Analysis: Service Profitability Review Booklet
  • Financial Planning and Analysis: Review Booklet: Updated Value Help, Additional Dialogs and Commenting for Review Booklet
  • Financial Planning and Analysis: Hotspots in Multidimensional Data Grid Apps
  • Accounting and Financial Close: SAP Fiori app ‘Manage Operating G/L Accounts’
  • Asset Accounting: AI-assisted Explanation of Fixed Asset Depreciation Keys (Beta)
  • Asset Accounting: SAP Fiori app ‘Post Asset Revaluation’ to Manually Readjust Asset Values
  • Asset Accounting: API for Asset-revaluation Postings
  • Group Reporting: SAP Group-level Green Ledger: Managing Greenhouse Gas Emissions for Group Reporting
  • Contract and Lease Management: Intercompany lease processing enablement in Contract and Lease Management
  • Event-Based Revenue Recognition: Support for imminent-loss handling for fixed-price customer projects and project-based sales
  • Event-Based Revenue Recognition: Shared-risk-based Revenue Recognition for Professional Service Projects
  • Cash Management: Optimization of Cash Flow Reporting by Including an Estimated Value of Default Bank Accounts
  • Advanced Payment Management: Migration Concept from In-house Cash to In-house Banking
  • Advanced Payment Management: Integration of Bank Account Management and In-house Banking Through Electronic Messaging
  • Accounts Receivables: Automated Fallback Processing Rules

Video 1: Release Highlight Video for Finance in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408

Here are the topics covered in the release video:

Financial Planning and Analysis: Cost Center Review Booklet

First off, we introduce the new Cost Center Review booklet, the second member of our highly acclaimed Review Booklet series. This tool allows overhead accountants to analyze and validate cost center data through predefined reports. It offers transparency in cost center reporting with business applications that combine application logic and comprehensive insights tabled in a user-friendly interface. You can effortlessly analyze and strategize actuals and plan efficiently for different scenarios.

With this app, you can display, analyze, and validate cost center data. The app displays information about actual and planned costs and groups several predefined reports under Actuals and Plan/Actuals pages.

Value Proposition

The cost centers review booklet helps overhead cost accountants achieve more transparency into cost center reporting by:

  • Providing business applications that embed insights into the relevant business context and help answer critical business questions for daily jobs out of the box.
  • Representing a new category of SAP Fiori apps that combine application logic and guidance with integrated multidimensional insights.
  • Helping to fulfill the promise of insight to action within embedded analytics.

Demo 1: Cost Center Review Booklet

Capabilities

  • Analysis of actuals and plan data in one report based on predefined pages to answer critical business questions efficiently.
  • Switch between guided views and generic slicing, dicing, and pivoting based on your business needs.

For more information, see Cost Centers Review Booklet

Financial Planning and Analysis: Review Booklet for Cost Centers: Gaining Financial Business Insights Powered by AI (Beta)

You can now gain financial business insights powered by AI. This feature employs a digital assistant to radically streamline your data analysis process. Whether it's analyzing tabular data or sharing results directly from our app, managing cost center data has never been easier. What's more - this feature is currently in our AI beta program, offering you a sneak peek into the exciting future expansions of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

Value Proposition

This feature supports you, as an overhead accountant, with the following tasks:

  • Analyze cost center data with increased efficiency.
  • Understand and interpret data with the help of the digital assistant (powered by generative AI).

Demo 2: Gaining Financial Business Insight Powered by AI

Capabilities

  • Based on the Actuals or Plan/Actuals page you’ve selected, you can:
  • Analyze tabular data.
  • Summarize tabular data.
  • Edit, copy, export, and share the results directly from the app.

For more information, see: Get Involved Early. Register and experience the latest AI features in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and influence upcoming AI developments. 

Financial Planning and Analysis: Service Profitability Review Booklet

We present the third member in the review booklet series: the Service Profitability Review Booklet for sales accountants. This booklet offers an in-depth, interactive glance at service-related financial Key Performance Indicators. You can now validate KPIs like billed revenue, recognized revenue, revenue adjustment, deferred revenue, accrued revenue among others under Margin Views - demystifying all dimensions of service profitability for service orders and service contracts. Easily stay ahead of your finances and ensure your service profitability stays right on target.

Value Proposition

You can analyze the following KPIs under Margin Views:

  • Revenue KPIs: Billed Revenue, Recognized Revenue, Revenue Adjustment, Deferred Revenue, Accrued Revenue.
  • Cost KPIs: Actual Costs, Recognized COS, COS Adjustment, Deferred COS, Accrued COS.
  • Margin KPIs: Recognized Margin.
  • Other KPIs: Reserves (You can monitor plan and actual comparison for P&L accounts).
  • KPIs: Actuals, Baseline, Ongoing.

Demo 3: Service Profitability Review Booklet

Capabilities

  • For Service Order you can report on margin views, actual view, and plan information.
  • For Service Contract you can report on margin views and actual view.
  • Line items will only be included in the calculation if the journal entry is assigned to a service (the service document is filled in the journal entry). Values are Shown in the company code currency.

For more information, see What's New Service Profitability Review Booklet

Additional innovations not covered in the video:

Financial Planning and Analysis: Review Booklet: Updated Value Help, Additional Dialogs and Commenting for Review Booklet

The Group Financial Statements Review Booklet has been enhanced with the following features: Active Page Filters button, Add Calculation function (see image), Conditional formatting dependent on threshold values in views and hierarchy in context menu.

Capabilities:

  • Active Page Filters button: It displays the number of active filters, and you use it to open the Page Filters panel in the side panel. This is where you add and remove page filters and their values.
  • Add Calculation: You can create calculations based on the measures or structures of your data source and add them to your table and chart.
  • Save conditional formatting in views: On the Formatting tab, you can define threshold values and display them with different background colors or as colored values. Now you can save such formatting as part of a private or public view.
  • Hierarchy in context menu: You can open the context menu of a hierarchy to drill to a lower level in the hierarchy or open all levels.

Figure 1: Add Calculation in Group Reporting Review Booklet

For more information, see: SAP Help Portal.

Financial Planning and Analysis: Hotspots in Multidimensional Data Grid Apps

As of release SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2408, you can see for which UI elements in-app help is available.

Value Proposition

  • So far, the in-app help was displayed in the help panel but you couldn't see the connection between the information and the UI. This has not been resolved.

Capabilities

  • How it works: Choose the question mark in the upper right corner to open the in-app help. The help panel on the right opens, and the little question marks (hotspots) tell you for which UI elements in-app help is available. To display the help, choose the question mark for the UI element you're interested in.

Figure 2: Hotspots on Help Topics in Multidimensional Data Grids

For more information, see: SAP Help Portal.

Accounting and Financial Close: SAP Fiori app “Manage Operating G/L Accounts

With the Manage Operating G/L Accounts app, you can perform actions to master data of operating G/L accounts depending on your role and the system that you access.

Value Proposition

  • View the master data of operating general ledger (G/L) accounts.
  • Create a new operating G/L account by copying an existing one, and adapt it according to your need​.
  • Efficiently activate a new operating G/L account in a company code by copying company code-specific settings from one source company code to one or multiple target company codes.
  • Enable mass change of attributes of multiple operating G/L accounts.

Capabilities

  • Streamline processes by focusing on operating G/L accounts.
  • Increase performance through a modern SAP Fiori app.
  • Smooth the user experience with a harmonized UI.

Figure 3: New Manage Operating Chart of Accounts App

For more information, see:  SAP Help Portal

Asset Accounting: AI-assisted Explanation of Fixed Asset Depreciation Keys (Beta)

Analyzing asset values for different depreciation areas can be difficult due to complex depreciation key settings. Powerful SAP Business AI helps you to easily understand the configuration settings of depreciation keys, resulting in efficiency and better decision-making for asset accounting and financial reporting.

Value Proposition

  • Reduce the time to onboard an asset by reducing the time to understand the complex setup of depreciation keys.
  • Improve business user productivity by easily understanding the asset and depreciation values.
  • Reduce the time to process periodic activities by reducing the time it takes to understand depreciation values. Periodic activities can be performed efficiently and in less time.

Demo 4: AI-assisted Explanation of Depreciation Key Configuration

Capabilities

  • Explains how depreciation keys operate and the rationale behind the system's depreciation calculations in a user-friendly and easy-to-understand natural language for business users.

More information: Customer Influence Page under SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, AI-assisted explanation of fixed asset depreciation keys in Finance.

Asset Accounting: SAP Fiori app ‘Post Asset Revaluation’ to Manually Readjust Asset Values

Use the SAP Fiori app Post Asset Revaluation (F7775) to manually post revaluations for assets and adjust asset values to either reflect inflation or apply market value principles. From the Manage Fixed Assets app (F3425), you can navigate to the SAP Fiori app Post Asset Revaluation (F7775) by choosing the Post menu button.

Value Proposition

  • Improved flexibility in asset revaluation postings, for example, by processing revaluation postings to offset an inflation-related cash devaluation or to apply market value principles in Asset Accounting.
  • Apply revaluations to acquisition and production costs (APC) and ordinary depreciation amounts.

Demo 5: New Post Asset Revaluation App

Capabilities

  • Post revaluation for an asset acquired either in the current fiscal year or in a previous fiscal year.
  • Revaluate an asset for selected ledgers and depreciation areas.
  • If necessary, adjust the specified revaluation amounts before the actual posting, by displaying the asset line items and choosing the Adjust Translated Values button.

More Information: Help Portal (Documentation) under Post Asset Revaluation.

Asset Accounting: API for Asset-revaluation Postings

Import asset revaluation postings into your SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition system using the API Fixed Asset – Post Asset Revaluation (API_FIXEDASSETREVALUATION_G4BA). You can use the OData version 4 service to post a one-time revaluation for one or more assets.

Value Proposition

  • Increase flexibility in asset revaluation postings.
  • Improve data accuracy compared to manually entering revaluation postings.
  • Reduce costs compared to manually entering revaluation postings.

Capabilities

  • Perform asset revaluations for multiple assets in one request.
  • Revaluate assets for selected ledgers and depreciation areas.
  • Apply revaluations to acquisition and production costs (APCs) and ordinary depreciation amounts.

More Information: Help Portal (Documentation) under Fixed Asset – Post Asset Revaluation.

Group Reporting: SAP Group-level Green Ledger: Managing Greenhouse Gas Emissions for Group Reporting

With this release, Group Reporting provides you with specific additional fields to support you in fulfilling mandatory quantitative disclosures for the emissions of greenhouse gas. After activating a business function, the following new fields are available to maintain the greenhouse gas emission quantity breakdowns in your SAP S/4HANA Cloud system:

  • GHG Scope
  • GHG Categor
  • Scope 2 Calculation Method​
  • Mode of Transport
  • Scope 2 Contractual Instrument

These fields are visible in the Define Consolidation Master Data Fields configuration step.

Value Proposition

The fields support you in becoming aware of your company's carbon emissions, understanding their financial implications and increasing efficiency in managing greenhouse gas emissions.

Figure 4: New Fields to Maintain GHG Emission Quantity Breakdown in Group Reporting

Capabilities

  • Define additional master data for greenhouse gas.
  • Import consolidation-related greenhouse gas entries into the consolidation system.
  • Define selections for restricting the data range for relevant greenhouse gas fields.
  • Upload reported greenhouse gas data for one or several periods.
  • Check the logs of the consolidation task for reclassification along the consolidation process for greenhouse gas data.
  • Make manual postings to adjust the reported greenhouse gas data.
  • Post multiple manual journal entries to adjust the reported greenhouse gas data.
  • Display line items of posting documents relevant for greenhouse gas data.
  • Display different views on consolidated greenhouse gas data.
  • Display, analyze, and validate greenhouse gas data.

For more information, see: Fields for Greenhouse Gas Emissions and Additional Fields for Greenhouse Gas.

Contract and Lease Management: Intercompany lease processing enablement in Contract and Lease Management

With this feature, you can manage real estate lease processes between two companies that belong to the same corporate group.

Value Proposition

  • Streamline the process of tracking and managing assets and their use across different divisions of a company, boost operational efficiency, and increase transparency.
  • Ensure optimal use of company assets by clearly defining the rights and responsibilities of each entity.

Figure 5: Intercompany Assignment of Usable Object

Capabilities

  • Manage intercompany lease-out contracts.
  • Manage intercompany lease-in contracts.
  • Make periodic postings for intercompany lease contracts (accounts receivable and accounts payable.
  • Run periodic valuation for intercompany lease contracts.

For more information, see: What’s New: Intercompany Lease Processes in Contract and Lease Management.

Event-Based Revenue Recognition: Support for imminent-loss handling for fixed-price customer projects and project-based sales

With this release, Event-Based Revenue Recognition provides a new option to automatically handle imminent loss for your projects. If you enter into a contract with a customer, you would expect the potential revenue of the contract to exceed the expected cost to generate profit. However, this might not always be the case. Per accounting standard, if the costs of a contract that the company expects to incur to fulfill the contract surpass the economic benefits it expects to receive from it, this contract is considered onerous. If a loss is expected in this type of contract, the entire loss should be recorded in the income statement.

Using the integration with customer projects, Event-Based Revenue Recognition assists in adhering to the accounting requirements for fixed-price projects with an expected loss including professional service projects and revenue-carrying enterprise projects.

Value Proposition

  • Enable automatic imminent-loss handling for fixed-price projects in project-based services and project-based sales.
  • Automatically identify a WBS billing element as onerous, if the planned costs are higher than the planned revenue.
  • Record a loss reserve for the expected loss in the income statement.
  • Adjust the loss reserve according to the cost-based percentage.

Figure 6: Record a Loss Reserve

Capabilities

  • Support customers in meeting international accounting regulations.

For more information, see: Loss Handling with Event-Based Revenue Recognition

Event-Based Revenue Recognition: Shared-risk-based Revenue Recognition for Professional Service Projects

With this release, the new revenue recognition key SPTMSR is available. Its purpose is to support the shared risk model for customer projects of the time and expenses contract type. In the shared risk model, the service provider agrees with the customer on an initial scope within which the customer can be billed at regular sales rates. The possible risk of having to provide services beyond the initially agreed scope is already foreseen at project creation. These additional services or costs shall be billed to the customer at a reduced sales rate. Billing at reduced sales rates for the same billing element can be achieved by creating a second work package assigned to the billing element with dedicated sales rates defined for the second work package. With this revenue recognition key, you can conduct revenue recognition for this scenario and calculate revenue recognition values for both work packages.​

Value Proposition

  • Focus on time and expense-based projects in which the customer agrees to share risk by being charged a reduced rate if additional work is needed to achieve the project scope.

Figure 7: Shared-risk-based EBRR Posting Scheme

Capabilities

  • Enable more precise revenue recognition for the described scenario, where a reduced rate is agreed upon if additional work is needed to achieve the scope. During revenue recognition, the reduced rate for additional work is considered not only once the additional work is done but also once it is known that additional work is needed.

Cash Management: Optimization of Cash Flow Reporting by Including an Estimated Value of Default Bank Accounts

Since SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2408, you can keep the liquidity item through the whole document chain when the cash flows are moved from the Treasury and Risk Management data source to the One Exposure data source.

Value Proposition

  • Empowering the cash manager to define the rules for estimating cash flow values for the default bank account without having the bank account information, such as cash flows from accounts receivable or accounts payable invoices.

Figure 8: AP Fiori app Short-Term Cash Positioning to view forecasted cash flows

Capabilities

  • Provide the cash manager with a complete view of cash flows including bank accounts Use the SAP Fiori app Short-Term Cash Positioning to view forecasted cash flows.

For more information, see: SAP Help Portal

Advanced Payment Management: Migration Concept from In-house Cash to In-house Banking

Setting up an in-house bank can lead to increased manual effort. Using an automation concept, master data should be created automatically.With edition 2408 there are two new migration object within migration cockpit available for in-house banking.

Value Proposition

  • Enable migration services to automate the creation of master data in in-house banking.

Demo 6: Master Data Migration from In-House Cash to In-House Banking

Capabilities

  • Provide a straightforward way to help customers move from in-house cash to in-house banking.
  • Provide migration object for in-house banking accounts and in-house banking conditions.

For more information, see: SAP Help Portal

Advanced Payment Management: Integration of Bank Account Management and In-house Banking Through Electronic Messaging

The new bank correspondence framework in the Manage Bank Accounts app allows users to efficiently manage their bank account-related attachments and electronic messages in a centralized location. With this feature, the bank account opening processing in Bank Account Management is now connected with In-House Banking to provide you with a more simplified and streamlined process of opening in-house bank accounts based on electronic messages of ISO20022 standard.

Value Proposition

  • Simplified integration between Bank Account Management and In-House Banking enables easy setup of individual in-house bank accounts, complementing the existing mass creation method via XML upload.
  • Streamlined and traceable process of opening in-house bank accounts through electronical messaging-enabled bank correspondence.
  • Enhanced transparency and traceability in bank related communications.
  • Easy access to important documents organized in one central place.

Demo 7: In-House Bank Account Opening via eBAM

Capabilities

  • Centralized management of all correspondence objects, including electronic messages and attachments, related to the account opening process.
  • Streamlined and traceable process of opening in-house bank accounts in Bank Account Management by integrating with In-House Banking.
  • Creation of new in-house bank accounts, sending requests to In-House Banking, receiving responses, and updating both the in-house bank account master data and the bank account master data.

For more information, see: Opening In-House Bank Accounts via Bank Correspondence and Managing Bank Correspondence​

Accounts Receivables: Automated Fallback Processing Rules

In the Manage Processing Rules – For Bank Statements and Manage Processing Rules – For Lockbox apps, you can create and automate processing rules that make bank statement processing and lockbox processing easier and smoother. Sometimes, bank statement items and lockbox items do not apply to any of the processing rules’ conditions in your system. In such a case, the system cannot process the items and you need to manually reprocess them.
To address this problem, we have created a special type of automated processing rules: “Fallback Rules”. As the name suggests, the system can now use automated fallback processing rules as a fallback. Fallback rules have a more simplified Conditions section where you can only enter conditions for company codes. This way, you can determine that items that could not get processed by other processing rules are processed in a certain way, according to the actions that you have defined in the fallback rule for the respective company code.

Value Proposition

  • Reduced number of unprocessed bank statement items and lockbox items.
  • Reduced manual effort in reprocessing items.
  • Easy to use and simple to create.

Figure 10: Automated Fallback Processing Rules

Capabilities

  • The Conditions section is already partly filled in, so you just need to enter the respective company codes.
  • You can immediately decide whether you want the fallback rule to carry out a one-step or two-step posting.
  • You can choose any of the four available action types: G/L Posting, AP/AR Posting, Clear in Sequence and Reprocess Items.
  • Fallback rules are immediately active as soon as you have created them.

Don’t hesitate to leave a comment and check out our community page to ask your questions and engage with the experts. Follow the PSCC_Enablement tag to stay up to date with our latest blog posts. Follow us on @Sap and #S4HANA, and myself on LinkedIn and X.

From July 8 to July 12, we hosted a series of 20 compelling live sessions to highlight the exciting innovations shipped with the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 release. Missed the live sessions? We've got you covered! Take advantage of the entire series or pick and choose the sessions most relevant to you. You will find a xx-minute-long recording and a presentation for LoB/Industry/Topic as well as 19 other topics of interest. Don't miss this chance and watch them on demand–anywhere, anytime.

Find All of Our Assets
